metrics.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN v.is_contractor = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
metrics.name: contractor_count

metrics.expression: ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN v.is_contractor = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(v.employee_id), 0), 2)
metrics.name: contractor_percentage

metrics.expression: ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN v.is_expert_role = TRUE AND v.education_rank < v.min_education_rank THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(v.employee_id), 0), 2)
metrics.name: low_education_expert_role_percentage
metrics.title_fa: درصد افراد با تحصیلات پایین‌تر در پست کارشناسی
